title: cyathiscus productus
intro: Cyathiscus productus, also known as the New Zealand hawthorn, is a flowering plant native to New Zealand. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyathiscus productus include lowering blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and reducing the risk of certain diseases. Herbal preparations of Cyathiscus productus are often found in teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
